response.justification: Bogdan brings 10+ years of progressive full-stack engineering experience with strong alignment to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker/Kubernetes are all present. His recent AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators and agentic frameworks at re:cinq) directly addresses a differentiated requirement. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js experience, limited Kotlin exposure (only dated Java usage), and no mention of Vitest or Playwright despite a strong general testing culture. A current 7-month career gap is a flag worth clarifying but not disqualifying given the seniority and breadth of the profile.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise spanning multiple senior roles (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq) with React and MongoDB in production at scale
Hands-on AI agent development experience including MCP framework contributions and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq
Exceptionally strong testing culture evidenced by open-source testing tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial runner), TDD advocacy, and workshop creation
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin is absent from the resume and Java usage is limited to pre-2018 tooling roles, leaving the secondary stack requirement unaddressed
Active career gap since October 2025 (approx. 7 months) with no explanation provided in the resume
